curation_notes: Patch adds a bounds check for P mode in ImagingPcxDecode (src/libImaging/PcxDecode.c), mirroring the existing check for mode '1'. Only 1 non-test source file changed. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow confirmed from CWE-120, advisory description ('PCX P mode buffer overflow'), and the patch diff which adds an overrun guard. No sibling decoders share the same vulnerability pattern — the missing bounds check is specific to PCX P mode handling.
